ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the gender */,
  "educational_attainment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the educational attainment level */,
  "income_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the income bracket */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Number of people in the specified demographic group */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who created the data */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who last updated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_income_bracket_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_bracket_id") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_educational_attainment_id FOREIGN KEY ("educational_attainment_id") REFERENCES educational_attainments ("educational_attainment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_group_range" TEXT /* Range of ages in the group (e.g., 00 to 17) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age group was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who created the age group */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who last updated the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_groups_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_groups_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gender was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gender was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who created the gender */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who last updated the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genders_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_attainments" (
  "educational_attainment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational attainment level */,
  "educational_attainment_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational attainment level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the educational attainment level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the educational attainment level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the educational attainment level was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who created the educational attainment level */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who last updated the educational attainment level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educational_attainment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_attainments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_attainments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_bracket_name" TEXT /* Name of the income bracket */,
  "income_bracket_range" TEXT /* Range of income in the bracket (e.g., C: 10,000 to 14,999) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the income bracket was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the income bracket was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who created the income bracket */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who last updated the income bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_brackets_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_brackets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
